name: Bagels (Lewis)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the dough.
2. Let it rise for only twenty minutes in a machine.
3. Cut into 12 pieces. Roll into balls and, using the thumb, put a hole in the middle.
4. Turn to shape, ensuring you have a good opening. Dust with flour if necessary.
5. Place on a greased cookie sheet and let rise for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. In a pan, place about 2 inches of water and bring to a slight boil.
7. Carefully lower 3 or 4 bagels at a time into the water.
8. Cook for 30 seconds on each side. Remove and drain on a towel.
9. Sprinkle with poppy seeds, sesame seeds, or onion bits if desired.
10. Place on a greased cookie sheet and bake in a preheated 550°F oven for 8 minutes.
Alternatively, roll the dough into rectangles and roll up like a hot dog, sealing well with water. After cooling, they can be frozen and will last from 1 month to 6 weeks. Diana
